description_long: This pedestrian adult is depicted as a male figure with a striking punk-inspired appearance, featuring a fitted jacket adorned with prominent red spikes on the shoulders and metallic studs along the seams. The jacket is layered over a shirt with vertical stripes and is paired with tight pants that have a gradient effect, transitioning from dark to lighter tones. He wears heavy-duty boots with thick soles and multiple buckles, adding to the rugged aesthetic. Accessories include a studded belt, fingerless gloves, and a small plush toy or keychain attached to his belt, suggesting a playful or rebellious personality. His face is partially obscured by a mask, and his hair is styled in a dramatic, swept-back fashion, further emphasizing his edgy urban style.
description: A punk-styled male pedestrian with a spiked jacket, studded accessories, heavy boots, and a dramatic swept-back hairstyle, exuding a rebellious urban vibe.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spiked shoulders, striped shirt, mask, and plush accessory on the belt.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the spiked jacket, plush accessory, and facial mask.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket with spikes, studded belt, and the full length of the boots.
description_view_3: Right rear angle showing the side of the boots, the plush accessory, and the hairstyle's volume.
attribute_clothing_type: punk-style spiked jacket, fitted shirt, tight pants, studded belt, fingerless gloves
attribute_posture: standing with a slight forward lean
